decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_nostrand-rogers-sbs) is itself the correct registry record for the Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service project. The registry record already incorporates this source (20101027_nostrand_cac_slides) and lists project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-20101027 as an alias. No different target record is needed; the observation is already correctly resolved.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Nostrand Avenue / Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service Community Advisory Committee Meeting 3
